title: The Windfairies
description: The Windfairies — knowledge fragments for AI agents

memes.label: About This Wiki
memes.description: A knowledge wiki for "The Windfairies" — this page is auto-generated from book metadata

memes.label: 'Table of Contents'
memes.description: 'Table of Contents'

memes.label: "The Great Storm"
memes.description: "The catastrophic storm in 'The Windfairies' that destroys the King's palace and saves Lucilla from execution, the climactic act of elemental retribution by the Windfairies"
aliases: the storm that destroyed the palace

memes.label: "Adam's Proposal to Kesta"
memes.description: "Farm worker Adam proposes marriage to the dairymaid Kesta, the first in a chain of escalating marriage proposals that reveals Kesta's vanity in \"Vain Kesta\" (Story 2)."

memes.label: Adam's Rejection of Kesta
memes.description: After Kesta's humiliating expulsion from town, she returns to the farm only to be rejected by Adam, who now sees her vanity clearly — the moral climax of "Vain Kesta."

memes.label: "Beauty"
memes.description: "Physical beauty as a morally ambivalent attribute — it can be a blessing, a danger, or a test of character in these fairy tales."

memes.label: "Cleverness"
memes.description: "The capacity for quick thinking and strategic action — a morally ambivalent trait that serves both virtuous and vicious ends."

memes.label: "Colophon"
memes.description: "Production notes for this Standard Ebooks edition."

memes.label: "Cruelty"
memes.description: "The deliberate infliction of suffering — the defining vice of authority figures across the tales, invariably met with supernatural retribution."

memes.label: "Dance"
memes.description: "A central motif in the Windfairies tales — dance as a supernatural gift, a test of character, and a means of transformation across multiple stories."

memes.label: "Dumb Othmar"
memes.description: "The tale of Othmar, who could not speak but whose heart was true."

memes.label: "Fear"
memes.description: "The emotional response to mortal danger and supernatural threat — a recurring psychological state that drives character decisions across the tales."

memes.label: "Gold and Wealth"
memes.description: "The recurring motif of gold as reward, temptation, and test of character across multiple fairy tales."

memes.label: "Greed"
memes.description: "The destructive desire for more than one's share — a defining vice in the moral universe of these fairy tales."

memes.label: "Home"
memes.description: "The place of origin and ultimate return — a spatial and emotional anchor that defines characters' identities and motivates their journeys."

memes.label: "Hope"
memes.description: "The sustained expectation of deliverance — the emotional force that enables characters to endure suffering and that the tales ultimately vindicate."

memes.label: "Hulda"
memes.description: "Co-protagonist of 'Dumb Othmar', an orphan girl whose steadfast love leads her on a perilous quest to restore Othmar's stolen voice"

memes.label: Hulda's Quest
memes.description: Hulda departs the village on a journey to find the dwarf and restore Othmar's stolen voice, the central quest of "Dumb Othmar" (Story 7).

memes.label: "Imprint"
memes.description: "Publishing and copyright information for this Standard Ebooks edition."

memes.label: "Class and Power in The Windfairies"
memes.description: "Cross-story analysis of social hierarchy and power dynamics in The Windfairies collection, examining how class, wealth, and authority function across the tales"

memes.label: "Faith and Loyalty in The Windfairies"
memes.description: "Cross-story analysis of faith and loyalty as recurring moral themes rewarded across the Windfairies fairy tale collection, examined through Nanina, Hulda, and the cosmic principle of keeping faith."

memes.label: "Music as Magic in The Windfairies"
memes.description: "Cross-story analysis of music as a supernatural force across The Windfairies collection — a power that enchants, compels, steals, and restores."

memes.label: "Transformation and Disguise in The Windfairies"
memes.description: "Cross-story analysis of transformation and disguise as a narrative device across The Windfairies collection, examining physical metamorphosis, identity concealment, and the moral function of change."

memes.label: "Vanity and Pride in The Windfairies"
memes.description: "Cross-story analysis of vanity and pride as recurring moral flaws across 'The Windfairies' and 'Vain Kesta', examining how Kesta, Lucilla, and the King each embody a different species of pride and how the collection calibrates punishment to moral gravity."

memes.label: journey
memes.description: The recurring motif of physical journeys — departures, travels, and returns — that drives narrative movement and character transformation across the Windfairies tales.

memes.label: "Keeping Faith"
memes.description: "The moral obligation to honor one's promises despite adversity — a central virtue rewarded throughout the fairy tales."

memes.label: "Kesta"
memes.description: "Protagonist of 'Vain Kesta', a dairymaid whose vanity leads her through a chain of escalating deceptions before public humiliation teaches her the cost of false pride"

memes.label: "Kesta's Audience with the Duke"
memes.description: "Kesta audaciously approaches the Duke while he fishes in his garden stream, nearly convinces him to marry her and become Duchess, but is unmasked by her own cheeses in \"Vain Kesta\" (Story 2)."

memes.label: "Kesta's Encounter with the Bailiff"
memes.description: "On her way to town, Kesta meets the Duke's bailiff and fabricates a story of being pursued by suitors to elicit a third marriage proposal in \"Vain Kesta\" (Story 2)."

memes.label: "Kesta's Encounter with the Banker"
memes.description: "In the high street of the town, Kesta approaches the wealthy banker and secures a fourth marriage proposal by inflating her list of previous suitors in \"Vain Kesta\" (Story 2)."

memes.label: "Kesta's Encounter with the General"
memes.description: "Kesta approaches the General of the army at the barracks square and secures her fifth marriage proposal by boasting of her previous suitors in \"Vain Kesta\" (Story 2)."

memes.label: Kesta's Encounter with the Miller
memes.description: Kesta the dairymaid meets a widowed miller on her way to town and considers his marriage proposal as a step up from farm life.

memes.label: "Kesta's Humiliation and Chase from Town"
memes.description: "After being exposed as a common dairymaid, Kesta is chased through town by a growing mob of her rejected suitors and their followers in \"Vain Kesta\" (Story 2)."

memes.label: Pages by Quality Tier
memes.description: All entity pages grouped by quality tier — featured, standard, and basic — sorted alphabetically within each group.

memes.label: Characters by Affiliation
memes.description: All mortal human characters grouped by social or institutional affiliation — court, village, farm, and other communities.

memes.label: Concepts by Theme
memes.description: Abstract concepts and themes from the tales, sorted by citation count to highlight the most pervasive thematic elements.

memes.label: Enrichment Candidates
memes.description: Basic-quality pages sorted by quality score (ascending), helping editors identify the highest-priority enrichment targets.

memes.label: Most Referenced Pages
memes.description: A dynamic ranking of the most frequently cited pages across all entity types, sorted by total reference count.

memes.label: List of Characters
memes.description: A dynamic index of all mortal human characters appearing in the fairy tales, sorted alphabetically.

memes.label: List of Concepts
memes.description: A dynamic index of all abstract concepts, themes, and recurring motifs explored in the fairy tales, sorted alphabetically.

memes.label: List of Creatures
memes.description: A dynamic index of all supernatural and magical beings — fairies, gnomes, spirits, and talking elements — appearing in the fairy tales, sorted alphabetically.

memes.label: List of Events
memes.description: A dynamic index of all significant story events and turning points across the fairy tales, sorted alphabetically.

memes.label: List of Places
memes.description: A dynamic index of all story locations and settings in the fairy tales, sorted alphabetically.

memes.label: "Love"
memes.description: "The central emotional force driving sacrifice, fidelity, and transformation across the fairy tales — tested, lost, and regained through supernatural intervention."

memes.label: "Lucilla"
memes.description: "Windmill-keeper's daughter who dances with the windfairies, keeps their secret through persecution, and is rescued by them in adulthood"

memes.label: "Lucilla's Dance Before the King"
memes.description: "Lucilla's Windfairy-gifted dance at the King's wedding feast in 'The Windfairies', a performance that captivates a court and sparks a queen's jealousy"

memes.label: "Lucilla's First Dance with the Windfairies"
memes.description: "The windfairies teach young Lucilla to dance on the downs, binding her with a promise of secrecy — the origin of her supernatural dancing gift."

memes.label: "Lucilla's Trial by Fire and Water"
memes.description: "Lucilla is accused of witchcraft, endures trial by drowning and fire, and is rescued by the Windfairies from the scaffold."

memes.label: "Lucilla's Wedding to the Sailor"
memes.description: "Lucilla marries the sailor who passed her dance test, departing from the mill to begin a new life in a cottage by the sea — the end of her girlhood and the start of her life as wife and mother."

memes.label: "Music"
memes.description: "The supernatural power of music and dance to enchant, transform, and reveal truth across the fairy tales."

memes.label: "Nanina"
memes.description: "Protagonist of 'Nanina's Sheep', a young shepherdess who disobeys her master, loses her flock to a fairy enchantment, and endures seven nights of excruciating pain to recover every last lamb"

memes.label: "Nanina Meets the Fairy Shepherd"
memes.description: "Nanina, ignoring her master's warning, visits the old fairy palace and encounters a beautiful shepherd boy whose magical pipe compels her and her sheep to dance in \"Nanina's Sheep\" (Story 4)."
aliases: Nanina's First Encounter with the Fairy
The Shepherd Boy and the Black Goats

memes.label: Nanina's First Enchanted Dance
memes.description: Nanina the shepherdess encounters a fairy shepherd boy playing a magical pipe and dances with him all night, losing her first lamb in the process.

memes.label: "Nanina's Flock"
memes.description: "The flock of sheep tended by Nanina, whose loss of a single lamb drives her into the fairy shepherd's realm and whose collective dancing to the magic pipe forms the tale's central spectacle."

memes.label: "Nanina's Painful Resistance"
memes.description: "Following the talking beech tree's counsel, Nanina buries her feet in the earth among its roots night after night to resist the fairy shepherd's enchanted dance, enduring excruciating pain to recover her lost flock in \"Nanina's Sheep\" (Story 4)."

memes.label: "Nanina's Seven Nights"
memes.description: "The seven-night ordeal in 'Nanina's Sheep' where Nanina is forced to dance by the Fairy Shepherd's pipe to recover her stolen flock"

memes.label: "Nanina’s Sheep"
memes.description: "Nanina and her beloved flock of sheep."

memes.label: "Obedience"
memes.description: "The fulfillment of commanded duty — a foundational virtue tested through temptation and curiosity across multiple tales."

memes.label: "The Magical Cat"
memes.description: "A grey-and-black cat of supernatural origin in 'The Story of a Cat' and its sequel, who brings fortune to a poor man and protects the widow's family"

memes.label: "Othmar's Muting"
memes.description: "The tragic event in 'Dumb Othmar' where Othmar follows the dwarf musician underground and returns to the village unable to speak"

memes.label: Othmar's Voice Recovery
memes.description: Hulda completes her quest and recovers Othmar's stolen voice from the dwarf musician, restoring his power of speech and song.

memes.label: "Pity"
memes.description: "The compassionate response to suffering in others — a recurring emotional register that distinguishes virtuous characters from the callous."

memes.label: "Promise"
memes.description: "A recurring moral theme across the Windfairies tales: the sacred duty of keeping a promise, and the consequences of breaking or honoring one's word."

memes.label: punishment
memes.description: The moral mechanism by which characters in the Windfairies tales face consequences for their actions, ranging from divine retribution to social humiliation.

memes.label: "Secrecy"
memes.description: "The obligation to withhold knowledge — the narrative mechanism that drives the central conflict of The Windfairies and appears as a test of character."

memes.label: "Social Class"
memes.description: "The rigid social hierarchy of the fairy tale world, where characters' fates are often determined by their birth and station rather than their merit or character"

memes.label: "The Bag of Gold"
memes.description: "The sack of gold the Sailor uses to bargain with the Windfairies for Lucilla's release in 'The Windfairies'"

memes.label: "The Bailiff"
memes.description: "The Duke's bailiff in 'Vain Kesta', an authority figure who harbors a personal grudge against the miller and takes pleasure in thwarting him"

memes.label: "The Banker"
memes.description: "A minor money-lender character in 'Vain Kesta' who is among the men Kesta claims wanted to marry her during her vain journey to town"

memes.label: The Barracks
memes.description: The military barracks in the town where soldiers drilled under the General's command, and where Kesta attempted to win the General's favour.

memes.label: "The Beech Tree"
memes.description: "A sentient beech tree near the old fairy palace that counsels and aids Nanina in recovering her lost sheep in 'Nanina's Sheep'"
aliases: the beech tree near the palace

memes.label: "The Beech Tree's Counsel to Nanina"
memes.description: "Desperate after losing her flock to the fairy shepherd's enchanted dance, Nanina binds the broken branches of a beech tree and receives supernatural counsel on how to resist the fairy's spell in \"Nanina's Sheep\" (Story 4)."

memes.label: The Beggar's Christmas Day Visit
memes.description: On Christmas Day, a freezing old beggar who looks remarkably like the rich old gentleman asks for charity at his window and is cruelly refused — a refusal that brings supernatural consequences.

memes.label: "The Black Goats"
memes.description: "The fairy shepherd's flock of enchanted black goats in 'Nanina's Sheep', who dance to the piper's music alongside Nanina's stolen sheep"

memes.label: "The Boat"
memes.description: "A small boat that appears in multiple tales, used for Lucilla's rescue from prison and by the King's son to court the Rain Maiden."

memes.label: the-captain
memes.description: A sea captain mentioned briefly in the opening tale "The Windfairies," representing the world of adventure and maritime life beyond the mill.

memes.label: the-castle
memes.description: A ruined castle on the mountainside where the Kings of the land once lived, serving as the setting for Hulda's trial and disappearance in "The Rain Maiden."

memes.label: The Cat
memes.description: A mysterious and handsome cat that appears on the hearthrug and becomes the beloved companion of a lonely old civil servant, transforming his life.

memes.label: The Cat's Arrival on Christmas Morning
memes.description: On Christmas morning after the old gentleman cruelly refuses a beggar, a mysterious large grey cat appears on his hearthrug as if by magic.

memes.label: The Cat's Transformation and Departure
memes.description: The mysterious grey cat, after a year of companionship with the old gentleman, vanishes overnight, prompting the cook to suggest it was a fairy cat — the moral climax of "The Story of a Cat."

memes.label: "The Cottage by the Sea"
memes.description: "Lucilla's married home by the sea in 'The Windfairies', a domestic refuge between her magical childhood and royal adventures"

memes.label: The Discovery of the Rare Tree
memes.description: Two botanical travellers discover a rare tree species growing beside a pool in the wilderness, setting in motion the events that separate the tree from the pool.

memes.label: The Downs
memes.description: The windswept coastal highlands where the windmill stood, home to Lucilla and the windfairies, a landscape of solitude and wild beauty.

memes.label: the-duchess
memes.description: The role of Duchess — a title Kesta briefly aspires to — representing the ultimate prize in the social hierarchy that the vain dairymaid foolishly pursues.

memes.label: The Duke
memes.description: The ruler who rejects Kesta after discovering she is a common dairymaid, representing the folly of vanity and social climbing in "Vain Kesta."

memes.label: The Duke's Horn
memes.description: The hunting horn carried by the Duke at his palace, which he blew to summon his pages and servants when enraged.

memes.label: The Duke's Palace
memes.description: The grand residence of the Duke, where Kesta attempted her most ambitious social climb, only to be discovered and expelled.

memes.label: "The Dwarf Musician"
memes.description: "A supernatural dwarf in a yellow cap who lures Othmar to an underground music kingdom in 'Dumb Othmar', where he is ultimately struck mute"
aliases: the dwarf in the yellow cap

memes.label: The Dwarf Musician's Arrival
memes.description: A dwarf in a yellow cap arrives in the mountain village leading a donkey laden with musical instruments, setting in motion the events of "Dumb Othmar" (Story 7).
aliases: The Dwarf Arrives in the Village

memes.label: "The Dwarf's Fiddles"
memes.description: "The supernatural musical instruments carried by the dwarf musician in 'Dumb Othmar', which serve as both tools of enchantment and symbols of Othmar's stolen gift"

memes.label: The Creation of the Enchanted Cup
memes.description: A gipsy girl creates a plain brown cup with a powerful love-and-hate spell, singing strange words into it and warning the potter of its double-edged magic.

memes.label: "The Enchanted Dance"
memes.description: "The recurring supernatural phenomenon across multiple tales in which dance serves as the point of contact between mortal characters and the fairy realm — a gift, a compulsion, a trial, and an art."

memes.label: The Destruction of the Fairy Palace
memes.description: On the final night of Nanina's resistance, after the last lamb is recovered, the fairy palace collapses into rubble with a thunderous crash and the voice of the beech tree bids her farewell.
aliases: The Collapse of the Fairy Palace

memes.label: "The Fairy Shepherd"
memes.description: "A fairy musician in 'Nanina's Sheep' who emerges nightly from the old palace to steal Nanina's flock with his enchanted pipe and forces her through seven nights of torment to win them back"

memes.label: "The Farm at Plötzin"
memes.description: "The large farm where Kesta works as a dairymaid and Adam works as a farmhand in 'Vain Kesta'"

memes.label: The Farmer
memes.description: A recurring character archetype in the fairy tales, appearing as the old farmer who employs Nanina in "Nanina's Sheep" and as Adam the farmhand in "Vain Kesta."

memes.label: The Garden
memes.description: A recurring garden setting appearing across several tales, including the Duke's garden in "Vain Kesta," the garden where the beech tree is transplanted, and the garden of the Gipsy's house.

memes.label: The General
memes.description: The commander of the Duke's army whom Kesta targets as a potential husband, later joining in her public humiliation in "Vain Kesta."

memes.label: "The Gipsy"
memes.description: "A mysterious gipsy girl with supernatural pottery-making powers who enchants the potter's clay and sets the events of 'The Gipsy's Cup' in motion."

memes.label: "The Gipsy Boy"
memes.description: "The young son of the gipsy woman, left in the care of the potter and his wife, who grows into a clever and resourceful boy in 'The Gipsy's Cup'."

memes.label: "The Gipsy Man"
memes.description: "A wandering gipsy with knowledge of the enchanted cup's charm who exploits its power to steal the potter's wife's love in 'The Gipsy's Cup.'"

memes.label: The Gipsy Woman
memes.description: The mother of the Gipsy in "The Gipsy's Cup," a poor widow who raised her son and daughter with wisdom, teaching them kindness to animals and the power of helping others.

memes.label: The Gipsy's Arrival at the Potter's Wheel
memes.description: A mysterious gipsy girl arrives at the young potter's roadside wheel during the fair, challenging his craft and creating magical wares by moonlight.

memes.label: The Gipsy's Challenge at the Potter's Wheel
memes.description: A young gipsy girl challenges a proud potter by demonstrating superior pottery skills and creating a magical cup with a love-and-hate spell.

memes.label: "The Gipsy’s Cup"
memes.description: "A mysterious cup with strange powers."

memes.label: "Nanina"
memes.description: "Protagonist of 'Nanina's Sheep', a young shepherdess who disobeys her master, loses her flock to a fairy enchantment, and endures seven nights of excruciating pain to recover every last lamb"

memes.label: "The Gnome's Lodging"
memes.description: "The year-and-a-day lodging bargain in 'The Ploughman and the Gnome', a contractual agreement that transforms the ploughman's fortunes with strict supernatural terms"

memes.label: The Gnome's Bargain
memes.description: A ploughman strikes a bargain with a gnome in his field, agreeing to share his harvest in exchange for prosperity, with unforeseen consequences in "The Ploughman and the Gnome" (Story 9).
aliases: The Ploughman's Bargain with the Gnome

memes.label: "The Gnome's Discovery in the Field"
memes.description: "A ploughman discovers a small black woman in his field who offers him a bargain — a share of everything in exchange for wealth and prosperity — setting in motion the central conflict of 'The Ploughman and the Gnome'."
aliases: the black woman in the field

memes.label: "The Gnome's Ultimatum"
memes.description: "The gnome confronts the ploughman with an ultimatum — she demands his wife's beautiful hair as penalty for the broken compact, the first of three escalating claims."

memes.label: "The Great Storm"
memes.description: "The supernatural rainstorm in 'The Rain Maiden' that heralds the rain maiden's arrival and returns with catastrophic fury at the wedding, fulfilling the ancient prophecy and reclaiming the shepherd's daughter into the elemental realm."

memes.label: "The Green Snake"
memes.description: "A bright green snake in the underground kingdom of 'Dumb Othmar', whose appearance guides Hulda on her quest to restore Othmar's voice"

memes.label: The Gypsy Woman
memes.description: Alternate spelling for the Gipsy Woman, the mother of the Gipsy in "The Gipsy's Cup." See [[the-gipsy-woman]].

memes.label: "The Gipsy's Cup"
memes.description: "A small brown clay cup created by a gipsy girl with an inherited charm that binds true love through a single draught but turns love to hatred with a second, driving the entire plot of 'The Gipsy's Cup'"

memes.label: "The Hills"
memes.description: "The elevated landscape that recurs across multiple tales as a site of journey, perspective, isolation, and encounter -- framing the geography of the fairy-tale world."

memes.label: "The King"
memes.description: "The ruler in 'The Windfairies' who admires Lucilla's dancing but capitulates to his Queen's jealousy — a study in the failure of authority when justice requires moral courage"

memes.label: "The King's Palace"
memes.description: "The royal palace in 'The Windfairies' where Lucilla dances before the King and Queen, a site of political intrigue and supernatural display"

memes.label: "The King's Wedding Feast"
memes.description: "The King's wedding celebration where Lucilla is summoned to dance before the royal court — her first public performance that catapults her from fisherman's wife to court sensation."

memes.label: "The Magic Pipe"
memes.description: "The Fairy Shepherd's enchanted pipe in 'Nanina's Sheep', whose music can compel goats, sheep, and humans to dance uncontrollably"

memes.label: "The Magical Cat"
memes.description: "A grey-and-black cat of supernatural origin in 'The Story of a Cat' and its sequel, who brings fortune to a poor man and protects the widow's family"

memes.label: the-marketplace
memes.description: The town square where Lucilla faces her witch trial and the windfairies stage their dramatic rescue in "The Windfairies."

memes.label: The Midnight Concert
memes.description: At midnight, the dwarf's musical instruments transform into singing men and women, their beautiful music stealing Othmar's voice, in "Dumb Othmar" (Story 7).

memes.label: "The Miller"
memes.description: "A suitor in 'Vain Kesta', a miller who flatters Kesta with false promises and represents the deceptive allure of town life"

memes.label: The Miller's Sails
memes.description: The great sails of the windmill on the downs by the sea, whose turning motion taught Lucilla to dance and served as a resting place for the windfairies.

memes.label: "The Mountain Village"
memes.description: "The mountain-top village in 'Dumb Othmar' where Othmar and Hulda live, a remote community visited by the dwarf musician"

memes.label: the-mountains
memes.description: The remote mountain setting where the village of Dumb Othmar perches high above the world, embodying isolation and the harsh beauty of nature.

memes.label: "The Mule"
memes.description: "The dwarf musician's pack mule in 'Dumb Othmar', laden with supernatural musical instruments from the underground kingdom"

memes.label: The Mysterious Cat's Arrival
memes.description: The morning after the old gentleman cruelly refuses the beggar, a large, well-groomed grey cat mysteriously appears on his hearthrug, marking the beginning of his moral transformation.

memes.label: "The Mysterious Girl"
memes.description: "A strange, beautiful girl who visits the potter's workshop in 'The Story of a Cat', whose supernatural skill at the potter's wheel hints at a deeper connection to the magical cat"

memes.label: The Old Farmer
memes.description: The old farmer who employed Nanina as a shepherdess, living near the old palace on the hill.

memes.label: "The Old Gentleman"
memes.description: "A wealthy but initially miserly old gentleman in 'The Story of a Cat' whose life is transformed by the arrival of a mysterious magical cat on Christmas Day"

memes.label: The Old Mother
memes.description: The widowed mother of Othmar in "The Story of the Singing Mouse," who lives with her son in a mountain village and supports him through his trials with the magical dwarf.

memes.label: "The Old Palace"
memes.description: "A ruined palace on a hill in 'Nanina's Sheep', where a mysterious light appears at night and the Fairy Shepherd holds his court"

memes.label: The Piper
memes.description: The fairy shepherd who emerged nightly from the old palace, playing a magic pipe that compelled Nanina and her flock to dance.

memes.label: "The Ploughman"
memes.description: "Protagonist of 'The Ploughman and the Gnome', a poor young ploughman who makes a bargain with a gnome that transforms his fortunes"

memes.label: "The Ploughman and the Gnome"
memes.description: "A ploughman strikes a bargain with a gnome of the earth."

memes.label: "The Ploughman's Field"
memes.description: "The field where a young ploughman encounters a gnome and strikes a fateful bargain in 'The Gnome's Revenge'"

memes.label: "The Pool"
memes.description: "A sentient pool of water in 'The Pool and the Tree' who converses with a tree about love, time, and the passage of seasons"

memes.label: "The Pool and the Tree"
memes.description: "A story of the enchanted pool and the wise old tree."

memes.label: "The Pool's Journey"
memes.description: "After the rare tree is uprooted and taken away, the pool is drawn up by the sun into a cloud and journeys across the world to find and rejoin its beloved tree in \"The Pool and the Tree\" (Story 3)."
aliases: The Pool Transforms into a Cloud
The Cloud's Search for the Tree

memes.label: The Pool's Transformation into a Cloud
memes.description: The pool, left behind after the tree's uprooting, is drawn up by the sun and transformed into a cloud to search the world for its lost companion.

memes.label: "The Potter"
memes.description: "A young potter in 'The Story of a Cat' whose compassion for a mysterious girl-child sets the story in motion"

memes.label: The Potter's Disappearance
memes.description: After his wife drinks from the enchanted cup a second time and her love turns to hatred, the potter leaves home to find the gipsy and undo the spell.

memes.label: The Potter's Marriage to the Golden-Haired Girl
memes.description: The potter uses the gipsy's enchanted cup to win the love of a beautiful golden-haired weaver at the fair, and marries her.

memes.label: the-prince
memes.description: A young prince who defies his father's expectations and falls in love with a beggar-maid, ultimately finding true happiness in "The Rain Maiden."

memes.label: The Prince's Proposal to the Shepherd's Daughter
memes.description: The King's son, fishing at a river, encounters the shepherd's beautiful daughter and falls in love, proposing marriage despite her reluctance and his father's anger — the pivotal event that tests the rain maiden's prophecy.

memes.label: the-princess
memes.description: A princess who arrives to marry the King in "The Windfairies," sparking the court celebrations that set the story's events in motion.

memes.label: The Prison
memes.description: The dark prison cell where Lucilla was confined by the jealous Queen, and where the windfairies continued to protect her.

memes.label: "The Queen"
memes.description: "The King's new bride in 'The Windfairies', a jealous and scheming woman who sees Lucilla's dancing as a threat to her position"

memes.label: "The Rain Maiden"
memes.description: "A maiden who brings the rain and changes a kingdom."

memes.label: "The Rain Maiden"
memes.description: "A mysterious tall woman in 'The Rain Maiden' who appears during a great storm and brings both devastation and renewal to a kingdom"
aliases: the woman in the grey cloak

memes.label: The Rain Maiden King
memes.description: Refers to the old King from "The Rain Maiden" (Chapter 8), the father of the Prince who married the shepherd's daughter. See [[the-king]].
aliases: the King in the Rain Maiden

memes.label: "The Rain Maiden's Arrival at the Cottage"
memes.description: "During a great storm, a tall woman in a grey cloak knocks at the shepherd's cottage door — the rain maiden seeking shelter and beginning her bond with the shepherd's family."

memes.label: The Rain Maiden's Arrival at the Cottage
memes.description: During a fierce rainstorm, a mysterious grey-clad woman appears at the door of a shepherd's cottage, drinks only water, and prophesies the birth of a daughter with a fateful condition — the supernatural frame of "The Rain Maiden."

memes.label: The Rain Maiden's Disappearance
memes.description: On her wedding day, the shepherd's daughter — the rain maiden's child — vanishes into the rain, fulfilling the prophecy that she would leave when her mother loved something else more than her.

memes.label: The Rain Maiden's Wedding
memes.description: The doomed wedding of the rain maiden (shepherd's daughter) to the King's son, disrupted by a catastrophic flood that sweeps the bride away.

memes.label: "The Raven"
memes.description: "A supernatural black raven in 'Dumb Othmar' who guides Hulda on her quest to restore Othmar's voice"

memes.label: "The River"
memes.description: "A river flowing near the shepherd's cottage in 'The Rain Maiden', where the King's son fishes and the maiden sits on its bank."

memes.label: "Adam"
memes.description: "A farm labourer in 'Vain Kesta' who loves Kesta faithfully but ultimately rejects her when he learns of her vanity and deception"

memes.label: "The Sailor's Courtship of Lucilla"
memes.description: "A shipwrecked sailor courts Lucilla by accepting her dance challenge on the downs — the only suitor who passes by seizing her waist rather than out-dancing her."

memes.label: "The Sea"
memes.description: "The sea that borders the world of the tales -- a place of homecoming, danger, dance, and elemental connection that frames the collection's first and most central story."

memes.label: "The Shepherd's Daughter"
memes.description: "The beautiful daughter of a shepherd in 'The Rain Maiden,' destined to marry a king before vanishing into the rain as foretold by a supernatural prophecy"

memes.label: "The Shepherd's Daughter's Wedding"
memes.description: "The shepherd's daughter's wedding to the Prince is disrupted by a catastrophic flood — the rain maiden's claim on the girl she has loved since infancy."

memes.label: "The Shepherd's Wife"
memes.description: "The wife of a shepherd and mother of the shepherd's daughter in 'The Rain Maiden', whose anger at a mysterious stranger sets in motion the story's central tragedy"

memes.label: The Spinning Woman
memes.description: A poor widow who travelled the country spinning and weaving with her two daughters, appearing at the fair where the Potter fell in love with her golden-haired daughter.

memes.label: "The Story of a Cat"
memes.description: "The life and adventures of a remarkable cat."

memes.label: "The Sailor"
memes.description: "Lucilla's husband in 'The Windfairies', a sailor who marries her and later bargains with the Windfairies for her return"

memes.label: The Talking Beech Tree's Advice
memes.description: A voice from a beech tree tells Nanina how to resist the fairy shepherd's enchanted dance by burying her feet in the earth like roots.

memes.label: "The Replanting of the Rare Tree"
memes.description: "The rare tree discovered by travellers is uprooted and transplanted to a city, where it withers — separated from its companion pool and the wilderness it belongs to."

memes.label: The Tree's Withering in the City
memes.description: After being uprooted from the wilderness and transplanted to a city garden, the rare tree begins to wither and die, separated from the pool that loved it.

memes.label: "The Underground Bird"
memes.description: "A bird in the dwarf's underground kingdom in 'Dumb Othmar' who remembers events from thousands of years ago and sings of lost voices"

memes.label: The Uprooting of the Tree
memes.description: The rare tree is dug up and transported away from its beloved pool by the botanists who discovered it, devastating both and setting the pool on a quest to find its lost companion.

memes.label: The Village Women
memes.description: The collective women of the mountain village in "The Story of the Singing Mouse," who form the community backdrop for Othmar's story and participate in the village festivities.

memes.label: "The Wedding Feast"
memes.description: "The King's wedding celebration in 'The Windfairies', the grand court event that serves as the stage for Lucilla's dance and the Queen's jealousy"

memes.label: "The Wicked Fairy"
memes.description: "A malevolent fairy musician in 'Dumb Othmar', described by Hulda as the being behind the dwarf's curse on Othmar's voice"

memes.label: "The Widow"
memes.description: "A poor widow in 'The Story of a Cat', mother of two children whose kindness to animals is rewarded through the magical cat"

memes.label: The Widow's Daughter
memes.description: One of the two daughters of the poor widow spinning-woman in "The Gipsy's Cup," who accompanies her mother to the fair and witnesses the miraculous healing.

memes.label: "The Wife's Arrival at the Farm"
memes.description: "The ploughman marries and brings his new wife to the farm — an event that disrupts his compact with the gnome, who had warned she did not like women in the house."

memes.label: "The Windfairies"
memes.description: "Lucilla lives in a windmill by the sea and befriends the windfairies who teach her to dance."

memes.label: The Windfairies' Rescue
memes.description: The Windfairies summon a great storm that destroys the scaffold and saves Lucilla from beheading, in "The Windfairies" (Story 1).

memes.label: The Windmill
memes.description: A windmill on the downs by the sea where Lucilla lived with her father, the poor miller, and where she learned to dance by watching the turning sails.

memes.label: The Windmill Man
memes.description: The miller who owned the windmill on the downs in "The Windmill," the father of Lucilla, a poor man whose simple life is upended when his daughter's dancing attracts royal attention.

memes.label: "The Wood Snakes"
memes.description: "Strange wood-snakes and toads in the dwarf's underground kingdom in 'Dumb Othmar', who emerge to listen to the supernatural music"

memes.label: "Truth-Telling"
memes.description: "The moral duty to speak truthfully, especially under threat — a key test of character in these fairy tales."

memes.label: "Uncopyright"
memes.description: "Public domain dedication and license information."

memes.label: "Vain Kesta"
memes.description: "A tale of vanity and its consequences."

memes.label: "Vanity"
memes.description: "Excessive pride in one's appearance or qualities — the defining vice of the collection's most memorably foolish character and a recurring moral warning."

memes.label: Vanity and Pride in The Windfairies
memes.description: Cross-story analysis of vanity and pride as recurring moral themes across The Windfairies fairy tale collection.

memes.label: "Windfairies"
memes.description: "The title creatures of the collection, grey-clad wind spirits who adopt human children and teach them to fly on the winds"

memes.label: "The Sailor"
memes.description: "Lucilla's husband in 'The Windfairies', a sailor who marries her and later bargains with the Windfairies for her return"

memes.label: "Wonder"
memes.description: "The experience of delighted amazement at beauty, magic, and the supernatural — the emotional gateway through which characters encounter the fairy realm."
